name: Fastly, Inc.
description: Fastly, Inc. operates an edge cloud platform for processing, serving, and securing its customers' applications. The platform is designed to take advantage of the modern internet, providing a programmable and agile infrastructure that allows developers to build and deliver digital experiences at the edge of the network. Fastly's services include content delivery, edge computing, security, and observability, enabling businesses to improve performance, enhance security, and scale their online presence efficiently. The company serves a diverse range of industries, including digital publishing, e-commerce, and financial services.
